hypothesis: Adding a differentiable 10-step NVE energy-conservation regularizer during MLIP training (implemented via JAX-MD unrolled velocity-Verlet) will reduce the median absolute total-energy drift over 1 ns 300 K NVE simulations by at least 50% for 1UAO and 1ABT at a 2 fs timestep while increasing SPICE2 validation force MAE by no more than 2% relative to an identically parameterized model trained without the regularizer.
